text.title: One Person Rollback Runbook Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo SaaS founder deploys v1.5.0 on Friday 18:00. Sentry fires alert at 18:12. Operator opens the rollback runbook and executes the documented two-command revert path; smoke suite passes at 18:21.

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-one-person-rollback-runbook.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field. `--self-test` exits 0 on both built-in fixtures.
